# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Only the latest release is supported with security fixes.

| Version | Supported |
| ------- | --------- |
| latest  | ✅        |
| older   | ❌        |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.

Instead, report them via [GitHub's private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/timobrembeck/flagpack-dart-sass/security/advisories/new).

You can expect a response within 7 days.
